title: Guidonia vareca
taxonomy: Guidonia vareca is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to Brazil and has been introduced to other parts of the world. The classification of Guidonia vareca is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Lamiales, Family: Acanthaceae, Genus: Guidonia, Species: G. vareca. This plant is often found in tropical and subtropical regions, and it is known for its vibrant flowers and adaptability to different environments. Further research is needed to confirm the full classification and distribution of Guidonia vareca.
